'''mowavaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:vulgarian|vulgarian]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-w-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vulgarian|vulgarian]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| mowavaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mowavithi|mowavithi]] || [[word:mowaviji|mowaviji]] || [[word:mowavishi|mowavishi]] || [[word:mowaviki|mowaviki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:mowavuthu|mowavuthu]] || [[word:mowavuju|mowavuju]] || [[word:mowavushu|mowavushu]] || [[word:mowavuku|mowavuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:mowavuthu|mowavuthu]] || [[word:mowavuju|mowavuju]] || [[word:mowavushu|mowavushu]] || [[word:mowavuku|mowavuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:mowavufthuf|mowavufthuf]] || [[word:mowavufjuf|mowavufjuf]] || [[word:mowavufshuf|mowavufshuf]] || [[word:mowavufkuf|mowavufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mowavethe|mowavethe]] || [[word:mowaveje|mowaveje]] || [[word:mowaveshe|mowaveshe]] || [[word:mowaveke|mowaveke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:mowavotho|mowavotho]] || [[word:mowavojo|mowavojo]] || [[word:mowavosho|mowavosho]] || [[word:mowavoko|mowavoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:mowavotho|mowavotho]] || [[word:mowavojo|mowavojo]] || [[word:mowavosho|mowavosho]] || [[word:mowavoko|mowavoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:mowavofthof|mowavofthof]] || [[word:mowavofjof|mowavofjof]] || [[word:mowavofshof|mowavofshof]] || [[word:mowavofkof|mowavofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:mowavĂŻfthĂŻf|mowavĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:mowavĂŻfjĂŻf|mowavĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:mowavĂŻfshĂŻf|mowavĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:mowavĂŻfkĂŻf|mowavĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:mowavĂŻfthĂŻf|mowavĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:mowavĂŻfjĂŻf|mowavĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:mowavĂŻfshĂŻf|mowavĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:mowavĂŻfkĂŻf|mowavĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:mowavĂŻfthĂŻf|mowavĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:mowavĂŻfjĂŻf|mowavĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:mowavĂŻfshĂŻf|mowavĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:mowavĂŻfkĂŻf|mowavĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:mowavĂŻfthĂŻf|mowavĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:mowavĂŻfjĂŻf|mowavĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:mowavĂŻfshĂŻf|mowavĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:mowavĂŻfkĂŻf|mowavĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mowavĂŠthĂŠ|mowavĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:mowavĂŠjĂŠ|mowavĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:mowavĂŠshĂŠ|mowavĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:mowavĂŠkĂŠ|mowavĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mowavatha|mowavatha]] || [[word:mowavaja|mowavaja]] || [[word:mowavasha|mowavasha]] || [[word:mowavaka|mowavaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mowavatha|mowavatha]] || [[word:mowavaja|mowavaja]] || [[word:mowavasha|mowavasha]] || [[word:mowavaka|mowavaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mowavafthaf|mowavafthaf]] || [[word:mowavafjaf|mowavafjaf]] || [[word:mowavafshaf|mowavafshaf]] || [[word:mowavafkaf|mowavafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:mowavasha|mowavasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:mowavshĂ«asha|mowavshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mowavroasha|mowavroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mowavmuasha|mowavmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:mowavyaasha|mowavyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomowavnkshĂ«asha|gomowavnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomowavnkroasha|gomowavnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomowavnkmuasha|gomowavnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomowavnkyaasha|gomowavnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:mowawavasha|mowawavasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mowawavshĂ«asha|mowawavshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mowawavroasha|mowawavroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mowawavmuasha|mowawavmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mowawavyaasha|mowawavyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomowawavnkshĂ«asha|gomowawavnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomowawavnkroasha|gomowawavnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomowawavnkmuasha|gomowawavnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomowawavnkyaasha|gomowawavnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:mewĂŠvasha|mewĂŠvasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mewĂŠvshĂ«asha|mewĂŠvshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mewĂŠvroasha|mewĂŠvroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mewĂŠvmuasha|mewĂŠvmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mewĂŠvyaasha|mewĂŠvyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomewĂŠvnkshĂ«asha|gomewĂŠvnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomewĂŠvnkroasha|gomewĂŠvnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomewĂŠvnkmuasha|gomewĂŠvnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomewĂŠvnkyaasha|gomewĂŠvnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:mowfavasha|mowfavasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mowfavshĂ«asha|mowfavshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mowfavroasha|mowfavroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mowfavmuasha|mowfavmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mowfavyaasha|mowfavyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomowfavnkshĂ«asha|gomowfavnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomowfavnkroasha|gomowfavnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomowfavnkmuasha|gomowfavnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomowfavnkyaasha|gomowfavnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|a3ddb2a}}
